sigma.t1021.001_rdp_connection_zeek_conn.yml:
title: T1021.001 Remote Desktop Protocol Connection in Zeek Conn
id: 5e6f4f79-9df9-4ec2-bcae-b2h7d3f8a606
status: experimental
description: Detects network connections to TCP port 3389 in Zeek conn logs, which may indicate Remote Desktop Protocol activity.
author: Anton Vulman
date: 2026-03-29
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1021/001/
logsource:
  product: zeek
  service: conn
detection:
  selection_dataset:
    event.dataset: zeek.conn
  selection_port:
    destination.port: 3389
  selection_proto:
    network.transport: tcp
  condition: selection_dataset and selection_port and selection_proto
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate administrative RDP activity
  - Help desk or system administration access
level: medium
tags:
  - attack.lateral-movement
  - attack.t1021.001
sigma.t1021.004_ssh_connection_zeek_conn.yml:
title: T1021.004 SSH Connection in Zeek Conn
id: 6f7a5a80-a0ea-4fd3-8db3-c3i8e4f9b707
status: experimental
description: Detects network connections to TCP port 22 in Zeek conn logs, which may indicate SSH activity associated with remote access or lateral movement.
author: Anton Vulman
date: 2026-03-29
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1021/004/
logsource:
  product: zeek
  service: conn
detection:
  selection_dataset:
    event.dataset: zeek.conn
  selection_port:
    destination.port: 22
  selection_proto:
    network.transport: tcp
  condition: selection_dataset and selection_port and selection_proto
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate administrative SSH activity
  - Approved automation using SSH
level: medium
tags:
  - attack.lateral-movement
  - attack.t1021.004
sigma.t1133_smb_connection_zeek.conn.yml:
title: T1133 SMB Connection in Zeek Conn
id: 7a8b6b91-b1fb-4ae4-9ec4-d4j9f5a0c808
status: experimental
description: Detects network connections to TCP port 445 in Zeek conn logs, which may indicate SMB activity associated with remote access, file movement, or lateral movement.
author: Anton Vulman
date: 2026-03-29
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1133/
logsource:
  product: zeek
  service: conn
detection:
  selection_dataset:
    event.dataset: zeek.conn
  selection_port:
    destination.port: 445
  selection_proto:
    network.transport: tcp
  condition: selection_dataset and selection_port and selection_proto
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate Windows file sharing
  - Administrative SMB usage
  - Domain and workstation communications
level: medium
tags:
  - attack.initial-access
  - attack.t1133

suricata.t1046_icmp_ping.rules: alert icmp any any -> any any (msg:"T1046 ICMP Ping Detected"; itype:8; sid:1000002; rev:1;)
suricata.t1059.001_powershell_download.rules: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"T1059.001 PowerShell Download via HTTP"; flow:to_server,established; http.method; content:"GET"; http.uri; content:".ps1"; nocase; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:1000005; rev:1;)
suricata.t1071.001_http_user_agent_python_request: alert http any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"T1071.001 Suspicious HTTP User-Agent Python Requests"; http.user_agent; content:"python-requests"; nocase; sid:1000004; rev:1;)
suricata.t1197_bitsadmin_download.rules: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"T1197 BITS Job Download Detected"; flow:to_server,established; http.user_agent; content:"Microsoft BITS"; nocase; sid:1000006; rev:1;)
